title: selago mediocris
intro: Selago mediocris, also known as Cape jester or creeping selago, is a flowering plant species native to the Western Cape province of South Africa. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, alleviating pain, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Selago mediocris include infusions, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
